name: ui-pop
description: Source-first UI wireframe and design-spec generator for legacy frontend screens.

scripts.lint: biome lint AGENTS.md README.md package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json tsup.config.ts biome.json src scripts tests
scripts.format: biome check AGENTS.md README.md package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json tsup.config.ts biome.json src scripts tests
scripts.format:check: biome check AGENTS.md README.md package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json tsup.config.ts biome.json src scripts tests
scripts.format:write: biome check --write AGENTS.md README.md package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json tsup.config.ts biome.json src scripts tests
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build
